description: Substring boundary traps — keyword stems must not trigger domain without word boundary. Includes positive controls confirming clean inputs still route correctly.

cases.note: auto in automation — \bauto\b boundary must hold

cases.input: press release signal for media coverage
cases.note: lease in release — \blease\b boundary must hold
lease in release — morphological variant of A1b

cases.input: market was struck by volatility last quarter
cases.note: truck in struck — \btruck\b boundary must hold
entire — no AUTO keyword present; sanity boundary check

cases.input: should we condone the risk exposure in this position
cases.note: condo in condone — \bcondo\b boundary must hold
role in parole — \brole\b boundary must hold

cases.input: rehire policy update in HR system
cases.note: hire in rehire — \bhire\b boundary must hold

cases.input: what to look for when buying a used auto
cases.note: positive control — standalone auto must route to AUTO
positive control — standalone lease with car context must route to AUTO
positive control — standalone truck must route to AUTO

cases.note: positive control — standalone condo must route to REAL_ESTATE

cases.input: how to negotiate a salary raise at my current job
cases.note: positive control — standalone raise with job context must route to CAREER

cases.note: positive control — standalone role must route to CAREER
